title: RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS RENT PAYMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent payment and rental deposit assistance based on funds available. 1865 Bill Frey Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Must have 72-hour eviction notice or be homeless. Other eligibility requirements based on available funding. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon Email (503) 585-6688 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 585-6688 Family Services Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for eligibility screening FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday 7am-9pm, Sunday 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Cherriots bus routes 3, 11, 23 Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - SCHOOL SUPPLIES DONATIONS FOOD - FOOD PANTRY LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ARTS & EDUCATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - FITNESS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING FACILITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY RAY & JOAN KROC CORPS
